revision.text:
[[en:Amonotoyototsu-hime]][[fa:آمایوتسو هیمه نو میکوتو]][[ja:天豊津媛命]][[ko:아마토요쓰히메노미코토]][[th:เจ้าหญิงอามาโตโยตตสึ]][[zh:天豐津媛命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|female|qid=Q6581072|1=Female (gender)}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|1=Empress of Japan}}|spouse={{ill|Emperor Itoku|qid=Q271536|1=Emperor Itoku}}|children={{ill|Emperor Kōshō|qid=Q312841|1=Emperor Kōshō}}|father={{ill|Okimi no Mikoto|qid=Q11492323|1=Ikisomimi no mikoto}}}} {{Infobox royalty | spouse = {{ill|Emperor Itoku|en|Emperor Itoku|qid=Q271536|lt=Emperor Itoku|1=Emperor Itoku}} | father = {{ill|Ikisomimi no mikoto|lt=Ikisomimi no mikoto|lt=Prince Okisomimi|ja|息石耳命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikisomimi no mikoto|qq=}} | name = Ame Toyotsuhime no Mikoto | imperial_consortRank = Empress of the 4th Emperor | image = | image_size = | caption = | alternative_text = | reign = | era_reign = | consort = February 11, 2nd year of {{ill|Emperor Itoku|en|Emperor Itoku|qid=Q271536|lt=Emperor Itoku|1=Emperor Itoku}}'s reign | empress_dowager = April 5, 1st year of {{ill|Emperor Kōshō|en|Emperor Kōshō|qid=Q312841|lt=Emperor Kōshō|1=Emperor Kōshō}}'s reign | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | burial_place = | posthumous_name = | alternate_titles = | childhood_name = | clan = | favther = [[Okisomimi no Mikoto]] | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Emperor Itoku|en|Emperor Itoku|qid=Q271536|lt=Emperor Itoku|1=Emperor Itoku}} | marriage = | children = {{ill|Emperor Kōshō|en|Emperor Kōshō|qid=Q312841|lt=Emperor Kōshō|1=Emperor Kōshō}}
[[Takeshi Hikokiyomose]] | adopted_children = | imperial_residence = | blank_label1 = Alternate Theories | blank_data1 = She was also identified as the ancestor of [[Shiki no Agatanushi]] (the [[Shiki]] district lords), referred to as [[Futotoma Wakakahime no Mikoto]] or Iihi Hime no Mikoto.
In one account, she is noted as [[Izumi Hime]], daughter of [[:en:Ite|Ite]], brother of [[Hae]] of the [[Shiki no Agatanushi]].
Another account identifies her as Iihi Hime, daughter of [[Tama Wakabiko]] of the Shiki lineage. | notes = }} {{ill|Amonotoyototsu-hime|ja|天豊津媛命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amonotoyototsu-hime|qq=}}, was the wife of Emperor Itoku, daughter of {{ill|Ikisomimi no mikoto|lt=Ikisomimi no mikoto|lt=Prince Okisomimi|ja|息石耳命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Okisomimi|qq=}}, and granddaughter of {{ill|Emperor Suizei|en|Emperor Suizei|qid=Q313321|lt=Emperor Suizei|1=Emperor Suizei}}. Daughter of Prince Okisomimi; granddaughter of {{ill|Emperor Annei|en|Emperor Annei|qid=Q313345|lt=Emperor Annei|1=Emperor Annei}} and {{ill|Nunasokonakatsu-hime|en|Nunasokonakatsu-hime|qid=Q11561868|lt=Nunasokonakatsu-hime|1=Nunasokonakatsu-hime}}. Gave birth to Emperor Kōshō and one other child. Empress dowager from 475 BC.Anston, p. 144 (Vol. 1) ;She was the mother of {{ill|Emperor Kōshō|en|Emperor Kōshō|qid=Q312841|lt=Emperor Kōshō|1=Emperor Kōshō}}. '''Ame Toyotsuhime no Mikoto''' (天豊津媛命) was the empress of {{ill|Emperor Itoku|en|Emperor Itoku|qid=Q271536|lt=Emperor Itoku|1=Emperor Itoku}} during the {{ill|Kesshi Hachidai|ja|欠史八代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kesshi Hachidai|1=Kesshi Hachidai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q838196}} period, and the mother of {{ill|Emperor Kōshō|en|Emperor Kōshō|qid=Q312841|lt=Emperor Kōshō|1=Emperor Kōshō}} and {{ill|Takeishihiko Kiyuse|ja|武石彦奇友背|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeishihiko Kiyuse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Overview == Ame Toyotsuhime appears in the ''[[Nihon Shoki]]'' as the empress of Emperor Itoku and is described as the daughter of {{ill|Ikisomimi no mikoto|lt=Ikisomimi no mikoto|lt=Prince Okisomimi|ja|息石耳命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Okisomimi|qq=}}.{{ill|Emperor Annei|en|Emperor Annei|qid=Q313345|lt=Emperor Annei|1=Emperor Annei}}'s first prince. One account in the ''Nihon Shoki'' names him Tokotsuhiko Irone (常津彦某兄), aligning more closely with his daughter’s name. In contrast, the ''[[Kojiki]]'' identifies Emperor Itoku's empress as [[:ja:賦登麻和訶比売命|Futotoma Wakakahime no Mikoto]] (Iihi Hime), an ancestor of the [[Shiki no Agatanushi]]. Alternative accounts in the ''Nihon Shoki'' describe her as [[:ja:泉媛|Izumi Hime]], the daughter of [[:en:Ite|Ite]], or as Iihi Hime, the daughter of [[:ja:太真稚彦|Tama Wakabiko]]. Researcher [[Toshio Hōga|Toshio Hōga]] argues that Emperor Itoku’s empress and Emperor Kōshō's mother was Futotoma Wakakahime, while Izumi Hime was one of Emperor Itoku’s consorts.[[Toshio Hōga]], "Genealogy of the Miwa Clan (Proposal)," ''Studies of Ancient Clans Vol. 7: The Miwa Clan and Ōmononushi Worship,'' Aogaki Publishing, 2015. {{-|qq=}} == Genealogy == {{Generations of Jimmu|qq=}} == References == {{Reflist|qq=}} == Bibliography == * [[Tarō Sakamoto (historian)|Tarō Sakamoto]] and [[Kunio Hirano]], ''Japanese Ancient Personal Names Dictionary'' ([[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan]]) * ''Complete Genealogy of the Imperial Family'' (Shinjinbutsu Ōraisha) * [[Toshio Hōga]], ''Studies of Ancient Clans Vol. 7: The Miwa Clan and Ōmononushi Worship'' (Aogaki Publishing) == See Also == * Dowagers|qq=}} * {{Consorts of Japan|qq=}} {{Empress dowagers of Japan|qq=}} {{s-start|qq=}} {{s-roy|jp|qq=}} {{succession box | title = {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} | years = XXX BC | before = {{ill|Nunasokonakatsu-hime|en|Nunasokonakatsu-hime|qid=Q11561868|lt=Nunasokonakatsu-hime|1=Nunasokonakatsu-hime}} | after = {{ill|Yosotarashi-hime|en|Yosotarashi-hime|qid=Q10869205|lt=Yosotarashi-hime|1=Yosotarashi-hime}} }} {{succession box | title = [[:en:Empress dowager of Japan|Empress dowager of Japan]] | years = appointed in XXX BC | before = Nunasokonakatsu-hime | after = Yosotarashi-hime }} {{s-end|qq=}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{translated page|ja|天豊津媛命|version=99550250|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{everybodywiki link|Amonotoyototsu-hime}} [[simple:Amatoyotsuhime no Mikoto]] [[ja:天豊津媛命]] [[fa:آمایوتسو هیمه نو میکوتو]] [[zh:天豐津媛命]] [[ko:아마토요쓰히메노미코토]] [[th:เจ้าหญิงอะมะโตะโยะสึ]] {{wikidata link|Q10940731}} [[Category:Female imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:日本の皇太后]] [[Category:生没年不詳]]
